CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c), "Adding Students", IF( AND( ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Adding Parents", IF( AND( ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Adding Staff", IF( AND( ISNULL(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Staff Logging In", IF( AND( ISNULL(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Parents Signing Up", IF( AND( ISNULL(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Tracking Attendance", IF( AND( ISNULL(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Logging Activities or Messages", IF( AND( NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c)), NOT(ISNULL(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c)) ), "Activated", "Not Available" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Calculated SaaS Activation Funnel Stage
